title: Hotel search returns results for a valid destination and date range
reason: Homepage search widget loaded; Bangkok, Thailand was selected from autocomplete, dates (11-14 Jun 2026, 3 nights) and 2 adults/1 room were set, and the results page listed Bangkok hotels with name, thumbnail, star rating, review score, and per-night price (e.g. Palette Hi Hotel Bangkok, 4 stars, 7.8 score, USD 23/night).

title: Price range filter restricts results to hotels within the specified nightly rate
reason: After setting the price filter to min 50 / max 150 USD (reflected in inputs and URL PriceFrom=50&PriceTo=150), the first results all showed nightly rates within range: Akara 68, Queensland 58, Solaria 129, Montraj 76, Sindhorn 120, SAMALA 56 USD.

title: Selecting a room type on the property detail page navigates to the booking summary screen
reason: From the Akara Hotel Bangkok detail page, clicking Book now on the Prarop Deluxe King/Room offer navigated to the checkout page whose summary correctly showed the property name, room types, 11-14 Jun 2026 dates, 2 adults, and a full price breakdown (room rates, nights, taxes & fees, total USD 241.79).
